briefdescription.para: metric returning 1 for every edge

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh)
memberdef.name: edgeLengthMetric

detaileddescription.para: returns edge's length as a metric; this metric is symmetric: m(e) == m(e.sym())

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points)
memberdef.name: edgeLengthMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh)
memberdef.name: discreteAbsMeanCurvatureMetric

detaileddescription.para: returns edge's absolute discrete mean curvature as a metric; the metric is minimal in the planar regions of mesh; this metric is symmetric: m(e) == m(e.sym())

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points)
memberdef.name: discreteAbsMeanCurvatureMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh)
memberdef.name: discreteMinusAbsMeanCurvatureMetric

detaileddescription.para: returns minus of edge's absolute discrete mean curvature as a metric; the metric is minimal in the most curved regions of mesh; this metric is symmetric: m(e) == m(e.sym())

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points)
memberdef.name: discreteMinusAbsMeanCurvatureMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, float angleSinFactor=2, float angleSinForBoundary=0)
memberdef.name: edgeCurvMetric

detaileddescription.para:
not-negative metric that depends both on edge's length and on the angle between its left and right faces
angleSinFactor
multiplier before dihedral angle sine in edge metric calculation (positive to prefer concave angles, negative - convex)
angleSinForBoundary
consider this dihedral angle sine for boundary edges; this metric is symmetric: m(e) == m(e.sym())

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, float angleSinFactor=2, float angleSinForBoundary=0)
memberdef.name: edgeCurvMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, float angleSinFactor=2, float angleSinForBoundary=0)
memberdef.name: edgeAbsCurvMetric

detaileddescription.para:
not-negative metric that depends both on edge's length and on the angle between its left and right faces (ignoring the different between convex and concave)
angleSinFactor
multiplier before absolute value of dihedral angle sine in edge metric calculation: zero - planar case, larger values of (PI - dihedral angle)
angleSinForBoundary
consider this dihedral angle sine for boundary edges; this metric is symmetric: m(e) == m(e.sym())

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, float angleSinFactor=2, float angleSinForBoundary=0)
memberdef.name: edgeAbsCurvMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric)
memberdef.name: edgeTableSymMetric

detaileddescription.para: pre-computes the metric for all mesh edges to quickly return it later for any edge; input metric must be symmetric: metric(e) == metric(e.sym())

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const std::vector< EdgeId > &edges)
memberdef.name: isEdgePath

briefdescription.para: returns true if every next edge starts where previous edge ends

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const std::vector< EdgeId > &edges)
memberdef.name: isEdgeLoop

briefdescription.para: returns true if every next edge starts where previous edge ends, and start vertex coincides with finish vertex

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, std::vector< EdgeLoop > &&loops)
memberdef.name: splitOnSimpleLoops

briefdescription.para: given a number of edge loops, splits every loop that passes via a vertex more than once on smaller loops without self-intersections

memberdef.argsstring: (EdgePath &path)
memberdef.name: reverse

detaileddescription.para: reverses the order of edges and flips each edge orientation, thus making the opposite directed edge path

memberdef.argsstring: (std::vector< EdgePath > &paths)
memberdef.name: reverse

briefdescription.para: reverse every path in the vector

memberdef.argsstring: (const EdgePath &path, EdgeMetric metric)
memberdef.name: calcPathMetric

briefdescription.para: computes summed metric of all edges in the path

memberdef.argsstring: (const EdgePath &path, const Mesh &mesh)
memberdef.name: calcPathLength

memberdef.argsstring: (const EdgeLoop &loop, const Mesh &mesh)
memberdef.name: calcOrientedArea

detaileddescription.para: returns the vector with the magnitude equal to the area surrounded by the loop (if the loop is planar), and directed to see the loop in ccw order from the vector tip

memberdef.argsstring: (std::vector< EdgePath > &paths, EdgeMetric metric)
memberdef.name: sortPathsByMetric

briefdescription.para: sorts given paths in ascending order of their metrics

memberdef.argsstring: (std::vector< EdgePath > &paths, const Mesh &mesh)
memberdef.name: sortPathsByLength

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeLoop &loop, FaceBitSet &addHere)
memberdef.name: addLeftBand

briefdescription.para: adds all faces incident to loop vertices and located to the left from the loop to given FaceBitSet

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, VertId start, VertId finish, float maxPathLen=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildShortestPath

detaileddescription.para: finds the shortest path in euclidean metric from start to finish vertices using Dijkstra algorithm; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, VertId start, VertId finish, float maxPathLen=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildShortestPathBiDir

detaileddescription.para: finds the shortest path in euclidean metric from start to finish vertices using bidirectional modification of Dijkstra algorithm, constructing the path simultaneously from both start and finish, which is faster for long paths; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const MeshTriPoint &start, const MeshTriPoint &finish, VertId *outPathStart=nullptr, VertId *outPathFinish=nullptr, float maxPathLen=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildShortestPathBiDir

briefdescription.para: if the path is found then its start vertex will be written here (even if start vertex is the same as finish vertex and the path is empty)
if the path is found then its finish vertex will be written here (even if start vertex is the same as finish vertex and the path is empty)

detaileddescription.para: finds the path from a vertex in start-triangle to a vertex in finish-triangle, so that the length start-first_vertex-...-last_vertex-finish is shortest in euclidean metric; using bidirectional modification of Dijkstra algorithm, constructing the path simultaneously from both start and finish, which is faster for long paths; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, VertId start, VertId finish, float maxPathLen=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildShortestPathAStar

detaileddescription.para: finds the shortest path in euclidean metric from start to finish vertices using A* modification of Dijkstra algorithm, which is faster for near linear path; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const MeshTriPoint &start, const MeshTriPoint &finish, VertId *outPathStart=nullptr, VertId *outPathFinish=nullptr, float maxPathLen=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildShortestPathAStar

briefdescription.para: if the path is found then its start vertex will be written here (even if start vertex is the same as finish vertex and the path is empty)
if the path is found then its finish vertex will be written here (even if start vertex is the same as finish vertex and the path is empty)

detaileddescription.para: finds the path from a vertex in start-triangle to a vertex in finish-triangle, so that the length start-first_vertex-...-last_vertex-finish is shortest in euclidean metric; using A* modification of Dijkstra algorithm, which is faster for near linear path; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, VertId start, const VertBitSet &finish, float maxPathLen=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildShortestPath

briefdescription.para: builds shortest path in euclidean metric from start to finish vertices; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, VertId start, VertId finish, float maxPathMetric=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildSmallestMetricPath

briefdescription.para: builds shortest path in given metric from start to finish vertices; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, VertId start, VertId finish, float maxPathMetric=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildSmallestMetricPathBiDir

detaileddescription.para: finds the smallest metric path from start vertex to finish vertex, using bidirectional modification of Dijkstra algorithm, constructing the path simultaneously from both start and finish, which is faster for long paths; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, const TerminalVertex *starts, int numStarts, const TerminalVertex *finishes, int numFinishes, VertId *outPathStart=nullptr, VertId *outPathFinish=nullptr, float maxPathMetric=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildSmallestMetricPathBiDir

briefdescription.para: if the path is found then its start vertex will be written here (even if start vertex is the same as finish vertex and the path is empty)
if the path is found then its finish vertex will be written here (even if start vertex is the same as finish vertex and the path is empty)

detaileddescription.para: finds the smallest metric path from one of start vertices to one of the finish vertices, using bidirectional modification of Dijkstra algorithm, constructing the path simultaneously from both starts and finishes, which is faster for long paths; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, VertId start, const VertBitSet &finish, float maxPathMetric=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: buildSmallestMetricPath

briefdescription.para: builds shortest path in given metric from start to finish vertices; if no path can be found then empty path is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, VertBitSet region)
memberdef.name: getVertexOrdering

briefdescription.para: returns all vertices from given region ordered in each connected component in breadth-first way

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, EdgeBitSet &edges)
memberdef.name: extractClosedLoops

briefdescription.para: finds all closed loops from given edges and removes them from edges

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const std::vector< EdgeId > &inEdges, EdgeBitSet *outNotLoopEdges=nullptr)
memberdef.name: extractClosedLoops

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const std::vector< EdgeId > &inEdges)
memberdef.name: extractLongestClosedLoop

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, FaceBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegionByMetric

briefdescription.para: expands the region (of faces or vertices) on given metric value. returns false if callback also returns false

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, VertBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegionByMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, UndirectedEdgeBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegionByMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, FaceBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegionByMetric

briefdescription.para: shrinks the region (of faces or vertices) on given metric value. returns false if callback also returns false

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, VertBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegionByMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const EdgeMetric &metric, UndirectedEdgeBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegionByMetric

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, FaceBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegion

briefdescription.para: expands the region (of faces or vertices) on given value (in meters). returns false if callback also returns false

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, VertBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, UndirectedEdgeBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, FaceBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, VertBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, UndirectedEdgeBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: dilateRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, FaceBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegion

briefdescription.para: shrinks the region (of faces or vertices) on given value (in meters). returns false if callback also returns false

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, VertBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, UndirectedEdgeBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, FaceBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, VertBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const VertCoords &points, UndirectedEdgeBitSet &region, float dilation, ProgressCallback callback={})
memberdef.name: erodeRegion

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const EdgePath &path, const Plane3f &plane, std::vector< MeshEdgePoint > *outIntersections=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getPathPlaneIntersections

briefdescription.para: finds all intersection points between given path and plane, adds them in outIntersections and returns their number

memberdef.argsstring: (const Contour3f &path, const Plane3f &plane, std::vector< Vector3f > *outIntersections=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getContourPlaneIntersections

briefdescription.para: finds all intersection points between given contour and plane, adds them in outIntersections and returns their number

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const EdgePath &path, const Plane3f &plane, float tolerance=0.0f, std::vector< EdgeId > *outInPlaneEdges=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getPathEdgesInPlane

briefdescription.para: finds all path edges located in given plane with given tolerance, adds them in outInPlaneEdges and returns their number
